subcodes.first_line: In these days, notwithstanding the sorrows that have befallen, the Beauty of Oneness is, at all times, occupied with the remembrance and praise of His sanctified Being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این ایام مع احزان وارده جمال احدیه در کل احیان بذکر و ثنای ذات مقدسش مشغول
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
